<?php /** * This file is part of the Nette Framework (https://nette.org) * Copyright (c) 2004 David Grudl (https://davidgrudl.com) */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Nette\Utils; use const IMAGETYPE_BMP, IMAGETYPE_GIF, IMAGETYPE_JPEG, IMAGETYPE_PNG, IMAGETYPE_WEBP; /** * Type of image file. */ /*enum*/ final class ImageType { public const JPEG = IMAGETYPE_JPEG, PNG = IMAGETYPE_PNG, GIF = IMAGETYPE_GIF, WEBP = IMAGETYPE_WEBP, AVIF = 19, // IMAGETYPE_AVIF, BMP = IMAGETYPE_BMP; }
